productDisplayName: Spice Art Women Casual Black Evening Clutch
description: Look your glamorous best with this spice art clutch, customised for the ethnic diva in you. Show off your ethno-western side with this piece, which is as functional as it is fashionable. Width: 15.5 cm Height: 7.5 cm Heavily embellished with beads on the outside and with crystals on the sides Has a three clasp-button closure Short beaded handle for style Raw silk inner lining Care Wipe surface with a dry clean cloth
